batch_objective: Flow Builder FB-P1 = flow.json persistence (named flows). Save/load a Flow to .s19tool/workarea/<project>/flows/<name>.json so it is reusable across a file and its variants. Save/Load/Import UI on the FlowBuilderPanel (surface-1 layout: name-strip + Save/Load row). Import copies an external flow.json into flows/ via copy_into_workarea (never executed in place). NEW: a ref-less REPORT block; every flow generates its report (model TBD at Phase-1 gate).

Requirements authoring to fold D1 (surface-1 UI), D2 (ref-less REPORT block + 'every flow generates its report' — model explicit-optional vs implicit-always to settle at the gate), and resolve the 4 prototype OQs.
